# Sidqly

Sidqly is a premium Islamic operating platform for verified giving, Qurbani, Ramadan, Zakat, Sadaqah, charity requests, vendor fulfillment, proof trust, delivery verification, donor-safe impact tracking, corporate CSR/Zakat reporting, receipts, certificates, QR verification, and dignity-safe operations.

Contact:
team@sidqly.com

Demo:
https://calendly.com/d/dvzs-3zf-cgz

Inquiry:
https://forms.gle/bvSMog9pw2Ri4kMt9

Payment:
Easypaisa Pakistan IBAN: PK19TMFB0000000060685814

Important:
Sidqly does not automatically approve Zakat eligibility, payment verification, proof visibility, or charity requests. Human review is required.
